developers.name: 0xMaki
developers.activity: Day-to-day protocol leadership after Chef Nomi exit, governance coordination, partnership development.

developers.name: Chef Nomi
developers.activity: Original protocol creator — returned $14M dev fund after community pressure. Stepped back from leadership.

developers.name: Joseph Delong
developers.activity: CTO, joining to rebuild engineering credibility and technical leadership.

narrativeAtSnapshot: SushiSwap launched August 28, 2020 as a Uniswap fork with added tokenomics (SUSHI rewards for LPs). Executed 'vampire attack' on Uniswap — migrated $1.14B in liquidity in September 2020. Chef Nomi controversy (withdrew $14M dev fund) resolved — funds returned, community governance now active. Price crashed from $10+ to $0.50 after controversy but community rebuilt. 0xMaki leading recovery. Joseph Delong joining as CTO signals engineering credibility restoration. Mention growth: ~2.5x week-over-week in DeFi communities as protocol recovers. Drama-driven crash created entry point below fair value. Structural signal: community-owned governance, actual $200M+ liquidity, MasterChef staking mechanism being forked by other projects (legitimacy signal), protocol revenue sharing with SUSHI stakers.
